name: Calculadora MCM y MCD
desc: Calcula MCD por algoritmo de Euclides; MCM = (a×b)/MCD(a,b). Ejemplo: MCD(48, 18) = MCD = 6; MCM = 144. Calculadora gratuita y precisa, sin registro.
description: Calcula MCD por algoritmo de Euclides; MCM = (a×b)/MCD(a,b). Ejemplo: MCD(48, 18) = MCD = 6; MCM = 144. Calculadora gratuita y precisa, sin registro.
seo_description: Calcula MCD por algoritmo de Euclides; MCM = (a×b)/MCD(a,b). Ejemplo: MCD(48, 18) = MCD = 6; MCM = 144. Calculadora gratuita y precisa, sin registro.
example_label: Find LCM and GCD of 48 and 60 for fraction operations or scheduling problems

range_hints.num1: Positive integers only; typical: 1-10,000 for practical use
range_hints.num2: Positive integers only; same range as num1

result_context: The mcm ({mcm}) is the smallest number divisible by both inputs; mcd ({mcd}) is the largest number that divides both inputs evenly.
formula_display: GCD: Euclidean algorithm | LCM = (num1 × num2) ÷ GCD
mistakes: Using decimal numbers instead of integers for GCD/LCM
Confusing which is larger (LCM ≥ both numbers, GCD ≤ both numbers)
Forgetting that GCD is needed to calculate LCM efficiently
